response: bat tokens issued by the village totaled 240 units, and since each token was worth 3 pence, the total monetary value available for transactions was 720 pence; given that the average purchase cost 18 pence, dividing the total value of 720 pence by the cost per purchase of 18 pence reveals that exactly 40 average purchases could be made with the entire issuance of tokens for that year. P.P.S.: lake
